Create a new account

description.content: This route is used by users or authors to register a new account on the platform. It takes a first name, last name, email, password, and role. Upon success, it creates the user record.

description.content: Authenticates a user using email and password. Returns an access token and refresh token upon success. Used for standard login flow.
